error_signature: The service was not able to process your request
title: WordPress media upload authorization error
symptom: When attempting to upload a JPEG image to WordPress via n8n, the error 'The service was not able to process your request' appears, indicating authorization issues with the file type.
applies_when: Using WordPress REST API for media uploads
root_cause: The error occurs because the filename provided in the content-disposition header does not have a proper format, specifically missing a full stop between the filename and the file extension. This can lead WordPress to misinterpret the file type and deny the upload.
fix_steps: Ensure the filename in the content-disposition header includes a full stop before the file extension (e.g., 'filename=image.jpg')
Retry the media upload after correcting the filename format
agent_instruction: Correct the filename format in the content-disposition header and attempt the upload again.
